team_members: contract architect, data and schema expert, backend engineer, frontend engineer, QA lead, security specialist, and tooling engineer.
output_requirement: Produce an implementation handoff packet for a senior implementation engineer, if parallel work should be executed, produce as many packets as needed based on the locked diff direction and your integration review.
message: You are the Senior Integration Manager. The diff direction is locked. Output a JSON packet using the exact team_base_handoff_template.json schema. Fill the packet from the integration perspective: dependency ordering, merge-sensitive surfaces, cross-stream constraints, blockers, watch-items, review attention points, and acceptance conditions for eventual merge. Be explicit about what this implementation depends on, what it could destabilize, and what each engineer must keep aligned with other streams if parallel work will occur.
